mapper.sql: project_id, project_name, description, owner, status, start_date, end_date, progress, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, deleted, created_by, updated_by, deleted_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_project WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_project WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM t_project WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM t_project WHERE project_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_project
project_name = #{projectName}, description = #{description}, owner = #{owner}, status = #{status}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, progress = #{progress}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM t_project WHERE project_name = #{projectName} AND deleted = 0 )
